metadata.description: cc10x v10.1.13 - Competition-grade Claude Code plugin with ruflo-informed research quality heuristics, multi-language silent-failure detection, friction-scan thresholds, rollback decision trees, plan completeness gates, behavioral TDD focus, partial-phase review scoping, abstraction thresholds, and evidence-before-reporting hard rules

plugins.name: cc10x
plugins.description: Trust-first Claude Code plugin with specialized subagents, composable skills, agreement-first planning, TDD-first phase execution, adversarial review, BDD-style verification, proof-of-work workflow artifacts, plugin-native hooks, and optional user-configured Bright Data/Octocode research acceleration.
